resources.string:
## Imilayelo Yekugcina Ikhiye Nekuphepha 

I-akhawunti yakho iphephiswe yikhiye yensitha. Ikhiye liyintambo leyindzala yenandza leligcina nge **nsec1**. Noma ngubani lonawo ikhiye yakho yensitha angashicilela imibhalo usebentisa bukhona bakho. 

- **Ungafaki** ikhiye yakho yensitha kuwo wonkhe uwebhusayithi noma isofthiwe longayetsembi. 
- Bachweli be-Amber **ngeke** bakucele ikhiye yakho yensitha. 
- **Gcina** ikhiye yakho yensitha ngekuphepha kugcina i-akhawunti yakho. Siyakucondzisa kusebentisa i-password manager.
I-pubkey yesigameko ayifani nalomsebentisi logcine ngalesikhati
Ukuphuma kuyasusa lonkhe lwati lwakho lwekhaya. Qiniseka kutsi unezikhiye takho tensitha tigcinwe ngekuphepha kutigcina i-akhawunti yakho. Ufuna kuphila?

Kutenga khefu kwekuphepha kwengeta, ungagombela ikhiye yakho ngephasiwedi. Ikhiye leli liqala nge **ncryptsec1** futsi ayikwati kusetjentiswa ngaphandle kwephasiwedi yakho. \n\nNawulahlekelwa yiphasiwedi yakho, ngeke ukwati kubuyisa ikhiye yakho.
I-biometrics yehlulekile kufakazela umnikati walenfomu. Liphutha: %1$s
Kungani ungahlola uhlelo lwakho lwe-nostr loluthandwako?
"Ufuna imvume yakho yokufunda ikhiye yakho yomphakathi nekusayina izigameko egameni lakho"

## Hlanganisa nge-Tor usebentisa Orbot 

1. Faka [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android) 
2. Qalisa Orbot 
3. Ku-Orbot, bheka i-Socks port. Itendele elisetshenziswako ngu-9050 
4. Nangabe kudingeka shintsha i-port ku-Orbot 
5. Misela i-Socks port kulesiskhini 
6. Chofota inkinobho ye-Activate ukusebentisa Orbot njengesivikelo

1. Faka [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android) 
2. Qalisa Orbot 
3. Ku-Orbot, bheka i-Socks port. Itendele elisetshenziswako ngu-9050 
4. Nangabe kudingeka shintsha i-port ku-Orbot 
5. Misela i-Socks port kulesiskhini 
6. Chofota inkinobho ye-Activate ukusebentisa Orbot njengesivikelo
Idatha yakho iyosuswa ngekushesha ngemtsambo wejwayelekile
Sita Tor ngaphakathi kuhlelo. Akudzingeki uhlelo lwangaphandle.
Taziso tekwamukela noma tenkhomba tificelo te-Bunker.
Kucondziswa kulabo labacabanga ngemfihlo futsi lababantu labanenjabulo yemlekeleli ngehlelo ngalinye. Ukukhetsa lokhu kuyakuchofotisa kuseta kutandwa kwakho njalo noma ugama uhlelo lolutsha.
Ngisayine tizigameko te-nostr ngekuzenzela noma ufuna kubheka tona ngehlelo ngalinye?
Lamavi akuvumela kubuye yenta i-akhawunti yakho nangabe ulahlekela ukungena. Abhale endaweni yekuphepha
Faka livi ngalinye lemavi akho ekubuyisela ngekuhleleka. Ungaphinde ubhece inkulumo yonkhe usebentisa inkinobho ye-clipboard.
Sebentisa inombolo yentse nangabe lo-mnemonic wasetshenjiselwa kudalwa kwamaakhawunti lamanyenti (m/44\'/1237\'/%1$d\'/0/0)
Lenkhungu ivumela ukwengeta i-nsecbunker ngekwengako, futsi isebentise nayo noma ngumuphi uhlelo lolweseka Nostr Connect (NIP-46)
Nangabe uhlelo lwakho lukunika ikhodi ye-QR ye-Nostr Connect ungayiskena lapha. Njalo loluhlelo lokungena lunikezwa tihlelo tewewhusayithi.
Nangabe uhlelo lwakho lukunika i-URL ye-Nostr Connect, ungayibeka lapha. Njalo loluhlelo lokungena lunikezwa tihlelo tewewhusayithi.

Njalo tihlelo te-Nostr tinenkhungu ye-\"Ngena nge-Amber\" levumela ukusebentisa Amber njengesayini yangaphandle; noma uchofota lobu bhatani Amber iyavulwa futsi ucela ukwamukela imimvume ethile.\n\nKepha unetinye tikhungu tekusebentisa Amber:

## ISAZISO SOKUPHEPHISA LESIBALULEKILE

Use ngekuseduze ngethumelela **WONKHE** maakhawunti akho e-Amber. Lefayela liyoba nezikhiye takho tensitha.

- **Vikelela ngephasiwedi** ifayela lakho lokuthunyelela ngephasiwedi loliqine
- **Gcina ngekuphepha** - ilisukela njengewaleti yakho
- **Ungabelani** nomunye umuntu
- **Susa** ekondinini kwakho emva kwekugcina ngekuphepha

**Noma ngubani lonalo ifayela angaphatha WONKHE maakhawunti akho!**
Faka iphasiwedi loliqine (hhayi ngaphansi kwamagama ali-8)
Iphasiwedi kufanele ibe nehlalaphi eli-8 noma ngaphezulu
Use ngekuseduze ngethumelela maakhawunti ali-%d kufayela legombelwe.
Lefayela liyoba nezikhiye takho tensitha zonkhe. Ligcine ngekuphepha!
Lephasiwedi igombela tikhiye takho ngaphambi kwekulayisha. Uyidinge ukubuyisela.
Gcina ikhiye legombelwe ye-akhawunti ngalinye ngisho ku-Google Drive. Akudzingeki ikhodi ye-API.

I-akhawunti ngalinye iyandzigcinwa njengefayela layo le-{npub}.ncryptsec. I-Android iyakucela lapho kugcina kona ngalinye — khetsa Google Drive kutfumela ngisho ngaphandle kwekugcina lutho kulendiyevisi.
Tiakhawunti letithile atizange tigcine. Bheka ikhunekheshini yakho.
Layisha kugcina kwakho legombelwe kuyo noma ngiyiphi iseva ye-WebDAV (Nextcloud, ownCloud, njl.).
Kudalwa kwe-nsecbunker yentsha kufanele uyiphe libito nekukhetsa irelay noma ngetinye, yiloko!
Phatha imimvume yohlelo ngekuyivimba kancane noma ngekuyibuyisela ngomphela. Imimvume yentsha yengetwa yihlelo nangabe yadingeka.
Kudalwa kwe-nsecbunker yentsha kufanele uyiphe libito nekukhetsa irelay noma ngetinye, yiloko!
Taziso tiyadingeka ukusebentisa Amber njengesac bunker.
%1$s udinga kusayina tizigameko letihlobene ne-%2$s imvume.
Irelay ayisekeli kukhokhela tizigameko te-Bunker. Ufuna kuyengeta noma kunjalo?
Phatha tirelay tokulanda idatha yeprofile yakho
Uyayitfola esigabeni semaakhawunti, ngakho-ke awudingi kuyikopisha manje.
Sicela wengete ibizo, ngekugcina uyakwati kulungiselela ngokwakho umpofile wakho wonkhe (imininingwane, sitfombe, njl.) usebentisa umuntu we-Nostr wakho lothandwako:
Seta Amber ngekhiye yakho yensitha ye-Nostr. Ungafaka tinguqulo letahlukene: Nsec, Ncryptsec noma Hex.\nUngaziskena futsi kuvela ku-QR Code.
Yikhiye yakho yomphakathi, luhlobo lwelibito lomsebentisi longabelana nawo nomunye umuntu ukumvumela akutfole ku-Nostr:

Manje ungacala ukusebentisa tihlelo lesisekela Amber, nangabe kudingeka Amber iyavulwa ikucele kwamukela imimvume.
Kulesikhombiso uyatfola tonkhe tihlelo tinemvume tesebentako.

Thola tonkhe tihlelo te-Nostr ze-android ku
Vala uhlelo nangabe yamukela noma yenkhomba imvume
Kususwa emininingwane yetilogi yamdzala kuvela ku-%1$s
Tihlelo tethile tingasheshisa nawe uzama kusebentisa kabusha i-URI ye-bunker. Susa lohlelo bese uyenta elisha nangabe ukungena akusebenti.
Nangabe kuvuliwe, Amber iyaconca isebenzi layona lengemuva ngekuzenzela ngemuva kwekuqalisa kwendiyevisi ukuze ukungena kuvakala nekufika kwetificelo te-NIP-46 kuyaqhubeka kusebenta.
Khetsa phakati kwekwakhiwa lokuqinile nelebeta (ngaphambi kokukhishwa)
Thola tihlelo te-Nostr letinyenti ze-android ku
Ungalahlekeli ukungena ku-akhawunti yakho ye-Nostr! Yenta kugcina
Isivikelo asisebenzi. Bheka imilungiselelo yakho yesivikelo/uhlelo.
Uqinisekile ukutsi ufuna kususa tonkhe imimvume kulohlelo?
Ufuna kubuyisela ikhunekheshini lesikhona \' %1$s\'? Nangabe ubuyisela ikhunekheshini lesikhona uhlelo lwangaphambilini luyochiteka.
Yehlulekile kuhlanganisa kurelay/isivikelo. Bheka nangabe wavula imvume yemnetiwekhi ye-Amber
I-Kill Switch ivuliwe, ukungena kuvakala nekulanda iprofile ngeke kusebente
Ufuna kutfumela umbiko wekuwa wakamuva ku-Amber nge-DM? Akukho lwati lwomuntu siqu loyotfunyelwa
Ufuna kukopisha umbiko wekuwa ku-clipboard yakho futsi uvule i-Client ukuwutfumela ku-Amber?
Amber yanamukela isicelo se-nostrsigner lesingenaphelele futsi ayikwati kusisebentisa. Sicela ubikele umchweli wehlelo leli liphutha.
" ufuna kufunda %1$s kuvela ku-%2$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe"
" ufuna kufunda luhlu lwetithegi kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe"
ufuna kufunda uhlu lwetithegi kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe
" ufuna kufunda lombhalo kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe"
ufuna kufunda umbhalo kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe
Funda luhlu lwetithegi kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe
Funda lombhalo kuvela ku-%1$s okuqukethwe okugombelwe
Yehlulekile kuhlanganisa kurelay. Ufuna kuyengeta noma kunjalo?
Ufuna kutfumela lombiko wokuhumusha ku-Amber nge-DM? Ungahlela lomyalezo ngaphambi kwekuwutfumela.
Ufuna kukopisha lombiko wokuhumusha ku-clipboard yakho futsi uvule i-Client ukuwutfumela ku-Amber? Ungahlela lomyalezo ngaphambi kwekuwutfumela.
ufuna kufunda okuqukethwe okugombelwe nge-NIP-44 v3
Nangabe uhlu lwemhlophe alulicwecwe, kufakazela kwehlelo kurelay (NIP-42) kuyovunyelwa kuphela tirelay etihlweni. Tificelo tekufakazela kuvela tirelay letinye tiyenkhomba ngekuzenzela.

I-akhawunti noma ngetinye aziange tigxunyiswe ngobe kukugcina lokuphephile kwendiyevisi yakho (KeyStore) kubuyisele liphutha:

%1$s

Leli yiphutha lejwayelekile leli-firmware kumanye amadiyevisi lapho inkhundla ingakwati kucupha tikhiye tekugombela tegciniwe.

Lokho ongakwenta:
• Nangabe unei-nsec (ikhiye yensitha) legciniwe, phuma kwe-akhawunti lephukile futsi ungene kabusha — lokhu kuyoyenta ikhiye yentsha lesebentako.
• Bheka ibuyekezo le-firmware yenkhundla livela kumboni wendiyevisi yakho, lelo lingalungisa leli. • Ungasusi Amber; ukugcina uhlelo kufakiwe kugcina kukwenta kuphila kwekubuyisela nangabe ibuyekezo le-firmware ikhishwa.
Tificelo letinyenti kakhulu kuvela ku-%1$s — siyabukela kancane

Nangabe kuvuliwe, Amber ishicilela ikhophi legombelwe yetihlelo takho tehlanganisiwe neyimimvume yazo etirelay kanye ngelilanga linye ukutsi ukwati tibuyisela kudiyevisi lentsha. Wena wedvwana ungaticudza kugcina.
Imimvume yetihlelo lesekhona kulendiyevisi iyabuyiselwa neyimimvume legcinwe. Tihlelo tentsha kuvela ekugcinweni tiyengezwa. Phila?
Kutfolakele kugcina kwetihelo okugombelwe ngetihlelo %1$d neyimimvume %2$d. Buyisela manje?
